result.stdout:
ChangeCurator.CLI 0.0.4
Copyright (C) 2026 Sebastian Zanoni

  -d, --description    Required. The description of the changelog entry

  -a, --author         The author of the changelog entry

  -i, --issue          The issue identifier of the changelog entry

  -t, --type           (Default: Added) The type of the changelog entry

  --help               Display this help screen.

  --version            Display version information.
